name: CDIF complete metadata
abstract: Profile combining CDIF discovery metadata with extended provenance (cdifProvActivity with instruments, agents, temporal bounds, methodology) and data description extensions for distributions (single-file, archive with hasPart, and WebAPI) and optional tabular/dataCube physical mappings. Defines properties: prov:wasGeneratedBy (cdifProvActivity), schema:distribution. Uses building blocks: cdifProvActivity (cdifProperties), dataDownload (schemaorgProperties), cdifDataCube (cdifProperties), cdifTabularData (cdifProperties), cdifArchiveDistribution (cdifProperties), webAPI (schemaorgProperties).
